Home / Services / Fence Installation & Repair

Fence Installation & Repair

Protect your property and enhance its curb appeal with a professionally installed or repaired fence.

Jolly Roger Custom Woodworking provides expert fence installation and repair services throughout Virginia Beach. We understand that a fence is more than just a boundary; it's an important element of your property's security, privacy, and aesthetic appeal. Whether you need a new fence installed or your existing fence repaired, we'll provide you with quality workmanship and exceptional service.

We offer a wide range of fencing options, including wood fences, vinyl fences, chain-link fences, and aluminum fences. We'll help you choose the right fence style and material to meet your specific needs and budget. We also offer custom fence designs to create a unique look for your property.

Our experienced fence installers are skilled in all aspects of fence construction, from post setting to gate installation. We use only high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure that your fence is built to last. We also provide fence repair services to address issues such as leaning posts, broken boards, and damaged gates. We understand the impact of Virginia Beach's weather on fences and use appropriate materials to minimize wear and tear.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site Survey and Consultation – We assess your property and discuss your fencing needs and preferences.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the right fence style and material for your property.
  3. 03 Step 3: Installation – Our skilled installers build your fence to exacting standards.
  4. 04 Step 4: Cleanup – We remove all debris and leave your property clean and tidy.

Benefits

  • Enhance your property's security and privacy
  • Increase your property's curb appeal
  • Define your property boundaries
  • Protect your pets and children

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of fences do you install?

We install a variety of fences, including wood fences, vinyl fences, chain-link fences, and aluminum fences.

How much does it cost to install a fence?

The cost of fence installation varies depending on the fence style, material, and length. We'll provide you with a free estimate.

Do you offer fence repair services?

Yes, we offer fence repair services to address issues such as leaning posts, broken boards, and damaged gates.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with fence installation & repair? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +17578696326
